textByHashes.da1c15f59475a90955d714d7ead19d9430a6ba97: Yes... I'm Maria Gadderanks. But... You're not one of Lord Jovkai's lot.
textByHashes.44808ddf90a37afe9c10d3b3395b3dd355f5d529: I... I think so. We only arrived here a short while ago, but they've already given us food and some new clothes for Ron.
textByHashes.5ce2a87bd87ab55d0ef9ec088ce51002ca155ee6: Yes... It seems nice here. We'd like to stay.
textByHashes.513d5338a98a82d2a0ec8b9430d3f6721b2a0acd: I thought we might do okay here but I guess we have another new owner now.
